need: The stakeholder needs to view St. Louis-area webcams from a single web page.
source_quote: "the stl webcam dashboard i'm making in HA and turn it into a web app"
rationale: Consolidate scattered camera bookmarks/feeds into one place.

need: The stakeholder needs to self-host the dashboard on a free static host and/or a personal website.
source_quote: "host on some free site like github pages or on my website n0ssc.com"
rationale: No hosting cost; owner controls publication.

need: The stakeholder needs to watch live video streams from cameras that provide them.
The stakeholder needs to view still-image cameras that update periodically.
rationale: Many sources are periodic JPEGs, not video.

need: The stakeholder needs to see each camera's geographic location and field of view on a map.
source_quote: "add a map view ... shows each camera's location AND Field of view"
rationale: Understand what each camera covers spatially.

need: The stakeholder needs to open a camera's stream by selecting it on the map.
The stakeholder needs to add or change cameras without editing application code.
rationale: Low-friction maintenance by a non-developer flow.

need: The stakeholder needs access to streams that resist embedding.
rationale: Some origins frame-bust; still want reachability.

need: The stakeholder needs to know each camera's operational status.
The stakeholder needs the dashboard usable on mobile and desktop, in light and dark themes.
notes: Device set and breakpoints not explicitly stated by stakeholder.

need: The stakeholder needs the dashboard to avoid overloading the browser when many feeds exist.
source_quote: "i'll keep an eye on it"; active-view-only decision
rationale: ~40 embeds cannot all mount at once.
notes: Quantitative performance target not stated -> see TBD-007.

need: The stakeholder needs camera geolocation and elevation data captured to enable a future viewshed capability.
source_quote: "i'd like to see a viewshed from some of the higher cameras"
notes: Viewshed itself is out of baseline scope (issue #1).

need: The stakeholder needs the system to run without a dedicated backend server.
The stakeholder needs the camera dataset to retain provenance and remain the single source of truth.
rationale: Traceability of where each feed came from.

need: The stakeholder needs the dashboard scoped to the St. Louis area.
